---
title: "Posts"
description-meta: "Posts and reflections by Juncheng Zhang"
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

Personal notes on solving the current-value Hamiltonian using the Lagrangian approach:)

- [Macro Current-value Hamiltonian (PDF)](files/notes/JZ_Macro_Current-value Hamiltonian.pdf){target="_blank"}
